items.raw_desc: Magnézium Vilgain magnézium-malát, 90 darab kapszula:Vilgain Magnesium Malate90 + 20 capsulesVilgain Magnesium Malate is a chelated form of magnesium in vegan capsules. Magnesium is a part of many important processes in the body and is therefore the basis of daily supplementation in sports and everyday life. Its effects affect the nervous system, and many of these effects are also seen during physical exercise. The package contains 90 capsules.                     An energizing form of magnesium with high availabilityTogether with bisglycinate, malate is one of the most highly absorbable forms of magnesium due to the unique binding of magnesium to a single malate molecule, which allows for faster absorption while protecting the element from antinutrients that can negatively affect magnesium absorption*. It can be based on the same efficient form as bisglycinate, with the difference that malate is part of the energy metabolism - specifically the Krebs cycle**. In addition to the usual benefits, revitalizing effects and higher energy levels can also be expected.
